assignment.task_analysis: One primary task analyst assigned the dimension vectors with per-task rationales as evidence.
assignment.audit: An independent methodology and code audit reviewed the rubric, implementation, and arithmetic.
assignment.limitations: Existing model results were already available, so v1 historical scores are not preregistered.

fn_remove_empty_vals.rationale: Recursive cleaning, post-recursion emptiness, and preservation of false and zero interact.

fn_vec_insert.rationale: Converts arbitrary sequential input and coordinates prefix, item, and suffix splicing.

fn_pluralize.rationale: One direct equality branch with one negative case family.

fn_ago_str.rationale: An ordered threshold ladder coordinates four derived units and multiple boundaries.

fn_keywordize_path.rationale: Handles keyword versus collection input and transforms names into a dotted keyword.

fn_normalize_email.rationale: Nil propagation must compose with trimming and lowercasing.

ds_honeysql_select.rationale: Translates SQL intent into several coordinated HoneySQL EDN clauses.

ds_hiccup_card.rationale: Translates a nested UI description into exact hiccup structure.

ds_malli_user_schema.rationale: Coordinates Malli entry syntax, exact order, and optional-property placement.

fix_submap.rationale: Corrects map and key direction while retaining map guards.

fix_update_if_exists.rationale: A single presence guard surrounds an otherwise direct update.

edn_status_counts.rationale: Direct aggregation from status values to counts.

json_config_to_edn.rationale: Direct representation conversion with no behavioral interaction.

strict_unused_binding.rationale: Direct static identification of one unused local.

strict_ring_response_edn.rationale: Direct translation to a specified Ring response map.

edn_route_names.rationale: Extracts and sorts one field from a supplied literal route tree.

ctx_remove_empty_vals.rationale: Uses the same recursive contract as fn_remove_empty_vals; examples do not add weight.

ctx_malli_user_schema.rationale: Uses the same schema contract as ds_malli_user_schema; examples do not add weight.

hard_require_auth_handler.rationale: Coordinates authentication, lookup, ownership, non-disclosure, and ordered responses.

hard_paginated_query.rationale: Combines query construction, paging, optional filters, false presence, and absent where.

hard_nest_join_rows.rationale: Groups flat joins, handles nil offers, nests entities, and sorts both levels.

hard_hiccup_status_table.rationale: Coordinates nested hiccup, conditional classes, conversions, order, and empty input.

hard_day_buckets.rationale: Combines integer bucket arithmetic, counting, sorted output, and empty input.

hard_flatten_dict.rationale: Recursive arbitrary-depth traversal accumulates and encodes paths into keys.

hard_apply_user_patch.rationale: Whitelisting distinguishes absence from explicit nil and false while preserving state.

hard_reitit_path_by_name.rationale: Recursive first-match search coordinates ancestor paths and absent results.

hard_honeysql_boolean_tree.rationale: Requires an exact nested Boolean query shape plus an optional exclusion branch.

hard_malli_errors_to_tree.rationale: Builds nested paths, handles integers, aggregates duplicates in order, and handles empty input.

hard_deep_merge.rationale: Recursive map-only merging distinguishes all non-map replacements, including nil and false.

fix_lazy_notification_effects.rationale: Requires eager ordered exactly-once effects despite laziness, with a fixed nil return.

hard_normalize_project_pull.rationale: Normalizes reverse references with filtering, sorting, exact shape, and absent children.

fix_threading_pipeline.rationale: Correct threading composes filtering, mapping, sorting, realization, and empty input.

hard_reduce_until_match.rationale: Requires reduced short-circuiting, non-realization, false preservation, and no-match behavior.

closed-order-stream.rationale: Lazy consumption crosses reader lifetime; output must be realized and blanks ignored.

hot-reload-pricing.rationale: Coordinates parsing, defonce state, reload, atomic replacement, rollback, and pricing.

tenant-cache.rationale: Cache identity spans tenant, revision, and product while nil and false remain cached.

webhook-event-fold.rationale: Coordinates deduplication, sequence monotonicity, stale IDs, effects, and replay.

payment-multimethod.rationale: Requires compound dispatch, exact method membership, defaults, and reload-aware inspection.

route-registry-reload.rationale: Macro expansion, Var identity, registry state, reload, idempotence, and dispatch interact.

transducer-completion.rationale: Stateful reducer arities, buffered completion, early termination, and completion count interact.

authorization-lazy-leak.rationale: Dynamic binding, laziness, authorization order, pagination, realization, and field removal interact.

dependency-planner.rationale: Iterative capability planning separates deterministic ties, missing capabilities, and cycles.

session-derived-index.rationale: Two persistent atoms maintain an exact index across mutation, rebuild, sorting, and reload.
